summary: Tightened anticipated-counter-pivot reply. Changed 'continental land-mass percentages, observatory readings of the geomagnetic field, CERES top-of-atmosphere energy fluxes — are direct measurements independent of the geometry dispute' to 'continental land-mass and ocean distributions, observatory magnetic-field readings, and CERES top-of-atmosphere fluxes — empirical quantities measurable independent of which projection you display them in'. Removes convention-dependent hemisphere-partition framing. Patch applied to data/sections.json:part2.html. Build passed, 3616/3616 tests pass.
